title: Bosch 2609256C48 Plunge Cutting Saw Blade
features: As a leading manufacturer for power tools accessories, Bosch offers the ideal accessories for virtually all applications
It is our aim to develop appropriate accessories for more efficient working
The research and development departments at Bosch work to develop and optimise accessories in line with the needs of users
description: From the manufacturer Bosch Starlock AIZ 32 RT5 Carbide-RIFF plunge-cutting saw blade Bosch Starlock AIZ 32 RT5 Carbide-RIFF plunge-cutting saw blade is coated with a tough carbide grit 50 for high wear resistance and extra-long lifetime. Curved cutting edge is a reliable solution for plunge cutting and unique long shape makes working in remote corners easy. Bosch Starlock system ensures the highest-torque transfer, reduced vibration and the ability for higher performance applications with the compatibility of all multi tools. Plunge cuts in severely abrasive materials (e.g. fibreglass). Rasping/filling functionality (e.g. deburring plunge cuts in fibreglass). Excellent for removing mortar right into the most remote corners. Simplified Tool Change Fast accessory changing within 3 seconds and with no risk of injury because the accessory no longer has to be touched with the hand when fitting and injecting it. Maximum Power Transfer Maximum power transfer due to 3-D tight-fitting connection for machine and Starlock accessory. Compatible With All Major Brand Tools Fully compatible with all Starlock and OIS tools from Bosch, Fein, Hitachi, Makita and others.
